Package sailpoint.object

Class Filter.BaseFilterVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.object.Filter.BaseFilterVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Filter.FilterVisitor
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    sailpoint.search.JavaMatcher
    Enclosing class:
    Filter
    public static class Filter.BaseFilterVisitor
extends java.lang.Object
implements Filter.FilterVisitor
    Base implementation of a FilterVisitor that throws unsupported exceptions for all operations.
